lead_profile_text: Sophisticated property investor adding STL to an existing portfolio of long-let and student properties. Purchasing a 1-bed flat in Bristol (Filton/BS34) specifically for short-term letting. Still pre-exchange; lawyers working since early May. Targeting go-live 1 August. No mortgage — full net income is clear profit. Setup quote SQ-2026-069 est. £4,370 pending floor plan.
emotional_profile: Precise and commercially sophisticated — not a first-time landlord. Asks specific, measurable questions (fire safety, inspection frequency, response times). Not emotionally driven; driven by ROI and operational rigour. Response time stats (100% within 5 mins on Airbnb) specifically called out as important to her.
delay_trigger_phrases: Still pre-exchange; lawyers working on it since early May
Hoping to complete in a few weeks
Touch base mid-July to check on exchange progress
Needs floor plan first — requested from agent, not yet received
delay_timeline: Exchange expected in a few weeks; target go-live 1 August; mid-July follow-up to confirm exchange progress

top_objections.zac_response: STL is unregulated in England outside Scotland and Greater London (90-day rule). National registration scheme discussed but not yet in force.

top_objections.text: What fire safety compliance is mandatory?
top_objections.zac_response: Advisory only (smoke alarms, blankets, extinguisher) — not mandatory. Stayful coordinates once property is accessible.

top_objections.text: Who handles the annual gas safety certificate?
top_objections.zac_response: Annual Gas Safe cert required; any registered gas engineer; Stayful can coordinate.

top_objections.text: How often will Stayful inspect the property?
top_objections.zac_response: Triggered by review drops or flagged issues, not on a fixed calendar schedule. Cleaners submit photos after each clean.

top_objections.text: Can Stayful actually maintain 5-minute response times on Airbnb?
top_objections.zac_response: Confirmed 100% response rate within 5 minutes on Airbnb.

top_objections.text: How much to fully furnish a 1-bed flat?
top_objections.zac_response: Setup quote SQ-2026-069: est. £4,370 full furnished setup — conditional on floor plan (requested from agent, not yet received).

top_questions.answer: Unregulated in England outside Scotland and Greater London (90-day rule). National registration scheme in discussion but not yet in force.

top_questions.text: What are the fire safety requirements?
top_questions.answer: Advisory only in England — smoke alarms, fire blankets, extinguisher recommended. Stayful coordinates setup once property is accessible.
Triggered by review drops or flagged issues, not on a fixed schedule. Cleaners submit photos after every clean for ongoing monitoring.

top_questions.text: What is Airbnb response time performance?
top_questions.answer: 100% response rate within 5 minutes on Airbnb. Jeanne specifically flagged this as important for ratings.

what_moved_them: Low competition in Filton area — only 33 reviews avg 4.6 rating; achievable within 6 months
Response time stats (100% within 5 minutes on Airbnb — specific and measurable)
Direct booking channel reducing platform commission and cleaning frequency
No mortgage = full net income is clear cash flow — clean value proposition
Airbus/MOD Abbey Wood corporate contractor demand story

conversion_gaps.gap: Exchange not yet completed — timeline dependency
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Mid-July follow-up: if exchange hasn't happened, timeline extends. Keep warm with agreement and action plan already sent.

conversion_gaps.gap: Floor plan needed before furnishing quote can be finalised
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Jeanne to chase estate agent for floor plan; Stayful to finalise SQ-2026-069 once received. Est. £4,370.
Zip-and-link in main bedroom + sofa bed gives 3 bookable beds; confirm configuration once floor plan received

zac_income_intro: Projected net revenue ~£1,700/month (after platform fees, cleaning, laundry, 15% management fee). Gross projected ~£38k/year; net ~£20k/year. ADR ~£164, occupancy ~78%. Best comparable doing £46k gross vs projected £30k Year 1 — upside exists.
zac_reassurance_phrases: 100% response rate within 5 minutes on Airbnb — that's a measurable stat, not a claim
Only 33 reviews average in the area at 4.6 — you can hit that within 6 months
Airbus and MOD Abbey Wood are right there — corporate contractor demand is your non-leisure floor
